Our internship program may be the right fit for you. This is an exciting opportunity to work with experienced and ambitious professionals (from both North America & Sri Lanka), supporting both agencies and brands with international marketing campaigns.
You will work closely with very experienced and accomplished senior marketers, giving you the chance to rapidly improve your skills and learn across many marketing disciplines and industries.
Successful interns may be invited to extend their internship and progress into junior roles within our company or partner teams.

For a candidate to succeed in this role, you will need the following:
Please highlight any experience you have in the following areas:
Note that it is not required to have this experience to be considered for the role! Not sure if you meet all the requirements?Apply anyway, and tell us in the note why you'd be an asset to the team.
This is a full-time internship (40 hours per week, M-F), offering flexible working hours and a mostly remote setup. Occasional travel to Colombo will be required.
While working hours are flexible, there is an all-hands team meeting every morning (M-F) in the morning (Some time between 8:30 - 10:00 AM IST). Other meetings are generally scheduled (M-F) between 6 and 10 pm IST to accommodate international team coordination.

Apply through the Rooster platform. Please include a short note (no more than 100 words) with your application. Let us know:Why are you interested in working for us specifically?

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Internship Program 2026 (Interior Design, Marketing, Construction, Operations, Procurement, Customer, Sales) Are you highly organized, people-oriented and passionate about great design?Are you excited by bringing creative projects, physical products and spaces to life?
Our internship program may be the right fit for you! It’s a full-time opportunity to work closely with a design-led, home décor and hospitality startup.
We have internship roles spanning design, product development, operations, procurement, construction management, customer support, sales, and marketing. Successful interns may be invited to extend their internship and progress into junior roles within the company.
You will work closely with a highly accomplished team, including successful entrepreneur founders, award-winning architects and designers, and celebrated artists and creatives - an amazing chance to rapidly improve your skills and learn what it takes to bring a successful brand to life.
Read on to find out if this is your next dream role!
Our internships provide a lot of opportunities to craft a career. There are multiple internship roles available, which each include the opportunity to try on many types of workstreams. Interns will take on a broad set of responsibilities, to help them to discover their best strengths and opportunities for careers in the future.
If you have a specific interest in a particular area, please indicate that in your cover letter.
Here are some examples of what interns on our teams can contribute to:
This role offers exposure to working with award-winning architects, artists and creatives: providing a 360º view of bringing an enchanting brand to life.
Working with a startup is a unique experience: there are no heavy layers of management, rigid structures or “that’s just the way it’s always been done”. We are often venturing into new areas, unfamiliar industries and developing new skillsets.
1. Impactful Work:All of our team members take on important projects, interns included. You'll have a chance to have a real impact for our company and partners.That also means:it's very important that work is done on time and to a high standard.
2. Flexibility:There are no overbearing managers or micromanagement. You will have guidance and support but no micromanagement.That also means:You will be responsible for your own outcomes. You will need to actively manage your time, and actively solicit feedback on your work to ensure that what you deliver is on schedule and provides value.
3. Full Participation:Good ideas come from anyone, including you. We care about the quality of the idea, work and always improving outcomes for us and our partners.That also means:you'll be expected to actively contribute ideas and participate in feedback for other's work outside of your chosen project.
Much of this work happens behind the scenes, and it needs to be done thoughtfully and well.
As part of your onboarding, you'll work with a senior member of the team to build a 90-day plan. This will help you to succeed in your initial contract period!
These are paid internships. Our interns take on real work, and are compensated accordingly and competitively.
These are full-time internships (40 hours per week, M-F), offering a flexible and dynamic working setup.
Please note any restrictions on your schedule in your application.We aim to accommodate where possible!
For a candidate to succeed in this role, you will need the following:
This role requires being present, engaged, and comfortable taking initiative.
Please highlight any work or project experience and clearly explain how it applies.
In your resume or cover letter, feel free to highlight any projects, work, or experiences that show how you might contribute across the types of work this role involves.
This can include internships, part-time work, volunteer roles, school or club projects, creative side projects, or personal initiatives.
You do not need formal work experience in these areas to apply. If you’re motivated, organized, and eager to learn, we encourage you to apply and tell us what you’d bring to the team.
Apply through the Rooster platform. Please include a short note or letter (~100 words is fine) with your application. Let us know:
Why are you interested in working for Kohomba? How does it tie into your future career goals?
If you are someone who enjoys building community, ambitious projects, and is looking to join a team with high standards who constantly pushes to improve and grow, we look forward to your application!
Come embark on an exciting journey in craft with us!
Applications without an attached note or letter will not be considered.
- Event Operations:Supporting day-to-day operations of our co-working studio space, including facilitating bookings, welcoming guests into the space and helping them get set up.
- Customer Relationship Management:Responding to customer inquiries and supporting a high-quality customer experience.
- Interior Design & Construction Site Coordination:Supporting our lead interior designer and architect by coordinating with contractors, construction teams, and vendors; assisting with site logistics, deliveries, schedules, and ensuring design plans are both communicated and executed accurately.
- Marketing:Supporting marketing coordination, including working with our different agencies and freelancers on website updates, graphic assets, and campaign materials.
- Content Creation:Assisting with content creation, including written or video content. Developing your skills in social media marketing, SEO and digital marketing fundamentals.
- Creative Shoots:Helping prepare spaces, materials, and logistics for creative shoots, including coordinating and working with agencies, photographers, and internal teams.
- Logistics & Supply Chain:Coordinating shipments and supporting basic logistics. Helping with packing and procurement where necessary.
- Manufacturing / Production:Coordinating with vendors, producers to support timely delivery and quality assurance of products. -Q1WORKSTREAM FULL
- Work location is mostly onsite at Kohomba’s studio in Colombo 10, with flexibility to work from home some days.
- Occasional travel within and outside of Colombo to visit vendors or sites will be part of the role (vehicle not required).
- Some flexibility around evenings or weekends is expected, as there may be scheduled events, or occasionally meetings with external partners (local and international) where we need to match their schedule.
- Strong attention to detail, and a deep care for the quality of work you produce.
- A willingness to step in where needed, to help the team achieve the greater goals.
- A keen interest in design, architecture, interiors, textiles, home decor, the arts, event operations, community-building, branding, or creative work and an eagerness to learn and grow in these fields.
- Strong organizational, and time management skills to effectively manage multiple tasks and deadlines.
- Clear, confident communication and people skills, especially around planning and coordination.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (we work mostly in English)andeither Sinhala or Tamil. Other languages are a plus - please mention them.
- (Very) proactive, results-oriented, and motivated to contribute to the success of the brand.
- Ability to work independently and collaboratively in both remote and in-person team environments. Kohomba Life Sri Lanka

Intern UI / UX As a UI/UX Design Intern, you will gain hands-on experience in user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) design while working with a dynamic and creative team. This internship provides you with the opportunity to apply your design skills, learn best practices, and contribute to real-world projects. You will collaborate on the design of digital products that prioritize user satisfaction, usability, and aesthetics.
Key Responsibilities:
1.UI Design:
• Collaborate with the design team to create visually appealing user interfaces for websites, mobile apps, and other digital products.
• Design and refine user interface elements, including icons, buttons, navigation menus, and interactive components.
• Assist in developing style guides and design systems to maintain design consistency.
2.UX Design:
• Assist in user research activities to understand user needs, behaviors, and pain points.
• Create wireframes, prototypes, and user flows to illustrate design concepts and user interactions.
• Conduct usability testing to gather user feedback and make design improvements.
3.Design Software and Tools:
• Gain proficiency in design software such as Adobe XD, Sketch, Figma, or other industry-standard tools.
• Collaborate with the team to learn and apply design best practices and techniques.
4.Collaboration:
• Work closely with cross-functional teams, including developers and product managers, to align design concepts with project goals.
• Communicate design ideas, rationale, and solutions effectively to team members. Qualifications:
• Currently enrolled in a relevant degree program, such as Graphic Design, Interaction Design, or a related field.
• Strong passion for UI/UX design and a desire to learn and develop skills in the field.
• Basic understanding of design principles, typography, and color theory.
• Familiarity with design software is a plus (Adobe XD, Sketch, Figma, etc.).
• Good communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a team.
• A positive attitude, creativity, and a willingness to take on new challenges.
This internship program is designed to provide a valuable learning experience for aspiring UI/UX designers. The intern will have the opportunity to work on real-world design projects, receive mentorship, and contribute to creating user-centered digital solutions that positively impact the user experience Softmint Software Solutions (Pvt) Ltd Battaramulla, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Intern - Social Media Management (Community Management) At Outright Play, we are building a music label and entertainment company with one mission:turn artists into extraordinary icons.Our vision is bold:take culture to the world.
This internship is not about “helping out” or fetching coffee. It is afull-time, hands-on rolewhere you will manage the digital presence ofone artist or brand. You will plan, post, and engage on social media every day — while learning how a professional community is built and run.
We live by our values:
This role is designed for someone who wants to learn the craft of community management from the ground up. You will be trained, guided, and given ownership. The pace is fast, the expectations are high, and the learning is intense.
Outright Play is a Sri Lankan music label and entertainment company with one mission:turn artists into extraordinary icons.Our vision is bold:take culture to the world.
We work across music, events, publishing, and collaborations. We manage artists, produce content, build brands, and connect with audiences. Every project is a step toward raising the standard of entertainment in Sri Lanka to match the world stage.
We are asmall, founder-led teamwith the focus and determination to create something rare in this industry. That means interns here don’t just observe — they contribute directly. You will learn by being part of real campaigns, events, and artist releases.
Our work is creative, fast-moving, and global in ambition. From social media campaigns to live performances, from music videos to brand partnerships, we bring artists and culture into the spotlight.
At Outright Play, you’ll be part of a team that demands commitment, but also offers unmatched learning. What you gain here, you won’t find in a typical internship.
Our Values
As a Digital Content & Community Intern, you will take ownership of the online presence ofone artist or brandunder Outright Play. This means you won’t just be observing or supporting — you will manage a real digital community from end to end.
You will plan content, publish across platforms, and engage with followers every day. You’ll also learn how to maintain content pillars, organize media, and ensure posts meet professional standards. This internship isfull-time, and the learning is hands-on.
What you can expect:
This is a learning role — but it is also a role with real responsibility. You’ll get guidance and feedback, but the results will depend on your discipline and commitment.
We are looking foryoung people who want to learn, can focus for long hours at a screen, and are serious about building a career in digital media and entertainment.
This internship is demanding, but it gives you something rare: the chance to gainpractical, ground-floor experiencein Sri Lanka’s only focused music label with global ambition.
As an intern, you will be assignedone artist or brandto manage. This will be your responsibility during the internship — you will learn how to run a digital presence from start to finish.
Platforms you may manage include:Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and in some cases Spotify and Apple Music (for music artists).
Your scope will include:
1. Content Pillars & Planning
2. Content Preparation
3. Quality Checks
4. Publishing & Engagement
5. Reporting & Feedback
This scope gives youfull responsibility for one entity— a smaller slice of the work, but still complete ownership. By the end of the internship, you’ll know how to manage the full digital cycle of a brand or artist.
As a Digital Content & Community Intern, you will be responsible for managing the online presence ofone assigned artist or brand.Your responsibilities will include:
1. Content Planning & Posting
2. Content Preparation
3. Engagement
4. Quality & Brand Alignment
5. Reporting & Improvement
This internship isfull-time and hands-on. You will learn how to manage a brand’s digital presence end to end, while being guided and supported by the team.
At Outright Play, internships are not for observation. They arefull-time, hands-on roleswhere you learn by doing.

We are not looking for experience. We are looking formindset, discipline, and the willingness to learn.
Mindset

Qualities That Stand Out
This internship is not about past experience. It is about showing that you canfocus, commit, and grow.If you bring the right attitude, we will teach you the rest.
Outright Play is not a big corporation. We are asmall, founder-led teamwith the ambition to take Sri Lankan culture to the world. That means the way we work is intense, direct, and hands-on.
What to Expect as an Intern
How We Work
The Payoff
This culture is not easy. It requires focus, commitment, and resilience. But if you give your best, it will prepare you for a career in music, media, or digital content like no other place in Sri Lanka.
This is not a token internship. It is afull-time, hands-on rolewhere you manage the digital presence of a real brand or artist. That means the growth opportunities are just as real.

Your Path Forward
This internship is demanding. But if you commit, it will give you the kind of learning and exposure that no classroom or traditional internship can match.
